tool_args.label: Challenges remain on 79th Street SBS corridor

payload.claim_text: Certain improvements could not be completed with in-house materials. Pedestrian safety measures don't have full impact until solidified with permanent materials. Crowding at certain bus stops and lack of circulation space. Some bus operations issues remain. Sections of the roadway and sidewalk in need of capital improvements and repair.
